programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to read his book but gets interrupted by too much noise.

programme.title: Super Sky
programme.desc: Fascinated by the super spy show, Mr. Bean decides to become a super spy himself. When he becomes suspicious of the Bruisers planning something, he starts to follow them. Later, he notices that the Bruisers are putting an old lady into a van.

programme.title: Scout Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a Scoutmaster for the day.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When there's no milk for his tea and for Teddy, Mr. Bean goes to buy some.

programme.title: Lord Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is in the library to draw the family tree of kings.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Snow White & The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A magic curse turns seven boastful princes into dwarfs until they can find a princess who would restore their appearance with a kiss. At the same time, nearby Snow White finds a pair of magic shoes that can transform her appearance at will. Based on the fairytale by the Brothers Grimm.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E19 Rainbow Cove Games - When Otto keeps winning at a board game, Chelsea imagines herself in Rainbow Cove where she plays an imaginary team sport against Barbie and the Notto Prince, and in the process, learns to lead her team with fairness and a positive attitude.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E20 The Magic Seeds - When Chelsea and Barbie discover a strange seed pod in their yard, Chelsea imagines herself in Sweetville, where everyone is planting crops for the Country Fair. But when her planting of a magic seed yields a super-big pumpkin which is impossible to, Chelsea learns that bigger isn't always better.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E21 A Sound in Sweetville - Chelsea hears a scary noise coming from under her bed, and instead imagines herself in Sweetville where residents are hearing a strange noise which is causing the Candy Castle walls to shake apart.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E22 It's Not Easy Being Clean - As Chelsea helps Barbie clean up her room, she wishes there was a way to do it superfast. In Sparkle Mountain, the Apprentice Queens create a mess with their spell-testing.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E23 Magical Gifts of the Forest - When Barbie gives Chelsea a thoughtful gift for no particular reason, Chelsea imagines herself in Wispy Forest where everyone is picking someone to give a gift to.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E24 The Sweetville Parade - As Chelsea and her friends decorate their bikes, they wonder if they could have their own parade, leading Chelsea to Sweetville where she inspires the whole town to come up with ideas to make the best parade ever.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E25 The Fancy Cheese Fiasco - When Chelsea and Otto accidentally break something of Barbie's, they are afraid to tell her. In Sweetville, they break a statue and try to conceal it from Barbie before a ceremony, before learning that it's best to be honest and confess to the mistake.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E26 The Tumblin' Tangleweed - Chelsea imagines herself in Wispy Forest, where everyone seems to have lost items that they did not return it to their proper place. A giant tumbling ‘tangleweed' of Wispy Forest is formed, and rolls through, picking up the stray items.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E5 The Sweetest Journey - While on a nature hike with Barbie, Chelsea runs ahead as Barbie takes her own sweet time. Meanwhile in Dreamtopia, Princess Berry Swirl Barbie prepares the castle for the Sweet Pair Party, but Peanut Butter can't find Jelly, so Chelsea help him find his partner in time for the big event.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E6 A Mopple Mishap - Like the game of telephone, Chelsea and her friends see just how easy it is for misunderstandings to occur. In Dreamtopia, a misunderstanding sends the Mopplekin into a panic.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E7 A Staticky Situation - A rainstorm keeps Chelsea from going outside, but that doesn't stop her from thinking about Dreamtopia! She arrives in the magical world to find an outbreak of static electricity that is causing everyone's hair to stick together and threatening to ruin their Disco Dance Party.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E8 The Lost Treasure of the Prism Princess - When sprinklers unexpectedly interrupt their soccer game, Chelsea and her friends must take cover in a small playhouse.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E9 Four Times the Chelsea - While Chelsea works with Otto on a puzzle, his know-it-all attitude has her wishing for a friend who is just like her. In Dreamtopia, Apprentice Queen Barbie grants that wish but accidentally creates three Chelsea clones.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E10 The Wispy Forest Hairathalon - At home, Chelsea is struggling to do a cartwheel but refuses Barbie's offer of help. Chelsea's imagination takes her to Dreamtopia where she finds herself participating in the Hairathalon.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E11 A Winning Color Combination - When they each open up a lemonade stand, Chelsea's lemonade is too sweet and Otto's too sour. In Dreamtopia, the color green is fading. Chelsea and the Rainbow Queen Barbie must convince a bickering Yellow and Blue Junior Rainbow Princesses to restore green and harmony to Rainbow Cove.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E12 The Damaged Spellbook - When Chelsea discovers that Otto has torn a page in a cookbook that he borrowed, she goes to Dreamtopia, where the Apprentice Queens perform an opposite spell that mysteriously goes haywire because Notto Prince covered up the fact that he tore a page from their spell book.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E13 Concert in the Clouds - When Otto gives Chelsea a hard time about her singing out loud, Chelsea goes to Rainbow Cove, where she is asked by Rainbow Queen Barbie to perform in a concert for the Cloud Council. With the help of her friends and Barbie, Chelsea finds the courage to sing out loud and proud.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E14 Forest Full of Friendship - While making friendship bracelets with Zoie, Chelsea imagines how they would share them in Dreamtopia. In Wispy Forest, friends create fantastical woven creations but struggle with sharing them until a talking tree needs help.

programme.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programme.desc: After elderly druid Getafix falls out of a tree, he resolves to find a young successor to whom he can entrust the secret formula for the magic potion that makes his village the only one in Gaul still unconquered by the Romans.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: With Josh off to college, Buddy joins the local baseball squad with his little sister Andrea. Once again, Buddy is a natural at anything with a ball! He is having a great season when suddenly, his puppies start to disappear from their homes!

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: Unjustly fired by a spoilt and selfish yacht owner, Kate gets payback when he falls overboard and wakes up with amnesia...

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet. Her new confidence empowers her to live fearlessly, but what happens when she realizes her appearance never changed?

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the Devil who slyly promises to do just that - for a price.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: 10,000 Days
programme.desc: After a comet hits the Earth turning it into a global wasteland, two families struggle to survive. Starring John Schneider and Peter Wingfield (2014).

programme.title: Shockwave: Countdown to Disaster
programme.desc: When a stolen seismic weapon is activated, a respected geophysicist warns of the potentially devastating global consequences. Stars Stacey Oristano, Rib Hillis (2017)

programme.title: Fire Twister
programme.desc: When a mysterious orb of light strikes an oil rig, the explosion evolves into a massive tornado of fire. Can the city of LA be saved? Stars Casper Van Dien (2015).

programme.title: Meteor Storm
programme.desc: San Francisco is a target for waves of destructive meteors after a rogue comet breaks from its orbit. Starring Micheal Trucco and Kari Matchett (2010)

programme.title: Arctic Apocalypse
programme.desc: After a massive amount of ice from melted glaciers turns the Northern Hemipshere into a frozen wasteland, a family has to try and find a way to safety. Starring Joel Berti, Jennifer Lee Wiggins and La

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Mafia loan shark turned Hollywood Producer Chili Palmer in this sharp sequel to "Get Shorty." With an unbelievably hip all-star cast that also includes Uma Thurman, André 3000, Steve Tyler, Christina Milian and The Rock, and bursting with the hottest music in the biz.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: A Hologram for the King
programme.desc: A Hologram for the King follows businessman Alan Clay (Tom Hanks) on a journey halfway around the world, far from his American roots, to a rising Saudi Arabian city.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: Boot up for suspense and high-powered excitement with Jonny Lee Miller and Angelina Jolie when a group of hackers, the rebels of the information age, find themselves embroiled in a plot that could destroy the world's ecosystems…or their own lives.

programme.title: Khumba
programme.desc: Rejected by his superstitious herd, a half-striped zebra embarks on a daring quest to earn his stripes but finds the courage and self-acceptance to save all the animals of the Great Karoo.

programme.title: Detective McLean
programme.desc: Allison and Devin investigate the death of a high-powered CEO. Meanwhile, Cameron and Mariah's mother, Jackie comes home from rehab.

programme.title: Detective McLean
programme.desc: Allison and Devin uncover the shocking truth at the heart of a turf war in Crestview. Later, Allison and Matt take the entire family to visit Tim in prison and Jackie, feeling jealous of the way Cameron looks up to Allison, makes a tragic choice.

programme.title: Instakiller
programme.desc: When teenager Harper becomes internet famous overnight, mom Layla's worried about the sudden attention – a fear that's justified when Harper is soon stalked online. Before too long the stalking has turned violent and Layla must face down the psychopath who is willing to kill her and her daughter.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on the worldwide best-selling memoir starring Academy Award® winner Brie Larson and Academy Award® nominees Woody Harrelson and Naomi Watts, THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Born of War
programme.desc: Mina finds out her father is a terrorist. For revenge, Mina works with British Intelligence to take him down.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: The true story of conscientious objector Desmond Doss who saved 75 men in WWII without firing a gun.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: Upside Down (2012)
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Wild Oats
programme.desc: Everything changes for Eva when she receives a life insurance check accidentally made out for five million dollars instead of the expected fifty thousand dollars. She and her best friend take the money and head out for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: The God Committee
programme.desc: Who lives, who dies? They decide. Three patients wait to see if they will live or die as a hospital committee decides to grant a life saving heart transplant to one of them. Years later the committee face the consequences of their decision. Starring Emmy Award winner Kelsey Grammer (Frasier) and Julia Stiles (Riviera), Janeane Garofalo (The Truth about Cats & Dogs) and Colman Domingo (Selma).

programme.title: I Used To Go Here
programme.desc: A quirky coming-of-age story from the producers of Sorry to Bother You, starring Gillian Jacobs (Community) and Jemaine Clement (Flight of the Conchords). Her engagement is cancelled, her first book isn't doing well, and all her friends are having babies. Kate is in a real rut when she gets a call from her old university asking her to do a reading, where she gets sucked into college life again!

programme.title: Miss Virginia
programme.desc: An inspiring, heart-warming and extremely relevant true story, starring Uzo Aduba (Orange is the New Black), Niles Fitch (This is Us), Matthew Modine (Full Metal Jacket) and Vanessa Williams (Shaft). When Virginia Walden an impoverished single mother is losing her fifteen-year-old son to the rough streets of Washington D.C. she launches a movement to change the system that is responsible.

programme.title: Samurai Marathon
programme.desc: From the team behind 13 Assassins this sword slasher is inspired by a real-life race! In the late feudal era of Japan, a young ninja is operating undercover in the court of an ageing Lord. When the Lord challenges his lazy samurais to a punishing marathon, the ninja's loyalties are put to the test. Directed by Bernard Rose (Candyman) and boasting a breath-taking Philip Glass soundtrack.

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: A young divorce mediator remains cynical until a client's dog pairs her with a local vet.

programme.title: The Way To The Heart
programme.desc: A struggling big-city chef returns to her hometown to rediscover her passion for food and reconnect with her father. Starring Meghan Heffern (2022)

programme.title: Love At Sea
programme.desc: Olivia gets the opportunity to organise an exciting event aboard a luxury cruise.

programme.title: Sunrise in Heaven [aka Forever Love]
programme.desc: A true story that spans over four decades between Jan and young G.I Steve, navigating family, faith, and love. You will be in for a roller-coaster of emotions. (2019)

programme.title: When Love Came to Town
programme.desc: Abby is a famous author whose latest stop on her book tour takes her to the town of Bliss. But little does she know that the locals are keen to play matchmaker for her. Lauren Holly stars. (2014)

programme.title: The Romantics
programme.desc: Oscar winner Anna Paquin and Katie Holmes prove nothing complicates love like friendship in this zeitgeist love story.

programme.title: 23 Walks
programme.desc: Dave and Fern, two older strangers, have been bruised by their individual circumstance. They meet walking their dogs in a North London park, and over the course of twenty-three walks together romance begins to blossom.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Workaholic Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies.

programme.title: The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: When Charlotte and Brandon meet, they rush into marriage after failing in previous relationships. Then they discover who they've vowed to spend the rest of their lives with for better or worse.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: For The Love Of Grace
programme.desc: After Grace Harding is saved from a fire by Steve Lockwood, a widowed firefighter, they teach each other to embrace life as they fall in love.

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: A young engaged man on the verge of success meets a beautiful woman he can inexplicably connect with in his dreams. Starring: Skyler Caleb, Meg Cionni, Tim Daly

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: When Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark", their blissful romantic getaway is rudely hijacked and they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: The Beautiful Beast
programme.desc: The classic Beauty and the Beast tale told with a twist! Isabelle is all beauty - on the outside. When she gets lost on a skiing vacation, she is helped by Jeremy, a man hiding from the world and his past. He's the first person to put Isabelle in her place, and Isabelle realizes she might be more beast than she wants to admit. Through Jeremy's influence she begins to change - and fall in love.

programme.title: Finding Love in Big Sky
programme.desc: An independent country girl, Paisley, takes on the task of upholding her adored grandfather's ranch. After being denied the funding needed to refurbish the ranch, she is reintroduced to her ex-boyfriend Josh, a big-time marketing executive stationed in Denver who has been suspended from his current position at his company. Admitting to herself that she needs the help, Paisley agrees to work with Josh while he is town to come up with ideas on how to raise money for the farm.

programme.title: Farm To Fork To Love
programme.desc: A young and talented chef, ALICE (Meggan Kaiser), works as a sous chef at one of the top restaurants in New York. After a disastrous night serving a food critic, she receives an invitation to judge a food competition in honor of the prestigious annual fundraiser for the St. Andrew's Children's Hospital. Alice accepts the invitation despite the dismay of BRETT, her boss who is also her boyfriend. Once she gets to Kansas, Alice is surprised to find her former boyfriend in college, CHRISTIAN (Scot cooper), is amongst the judges. The cooking show and her reconnection with Christian will make Alice reconsider her calling and make her dreams come true.

programme.title: Retreat to Paradise
programme.desc: Ellie tends to the injured and cantankerous Jordan as he heals from a shoulder injury. Though he struggles to learn to use his arm again, his attitude leaves Ellie wanting to leave him in his misery. But as they get to know each other more, Jordan starts to see Ellie is exactly who he wants in his life, and hopes Ellie feels the same way.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather
programme.desc: Nicole learns stepfather Matthew died, mother Kate arrested.

programme.title: Sins in the Suburbs
programme.desc: Struggling artist Heather is intrigued by charming neighbor Tyler.

programme.title: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: A high school history teacher's perfect life is disrupted by a sex scandal.

programme.title: The Wrong Stepfather
programme.desc: Principal Ellen thinks friend Karen's swift engagement to Craig Green is odd.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather
programme.desc: Nicole learns stepfather Matthew died, mother Kate arrested.

programme.title: A Man for Every Month
programme.desc: Blogger, Megan, tends to shy away from dating, but that all changes when her boss assigns her to vlog her dates for the eligible bachelor calendar. Now pushed out of her comfort zone, Megan must quickly learn the golden rules of dating.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: A Winter Rose: Directors Cut
programme.desc: After being diagnosed with cancer, a legendary singer, her manager and husband discover a gifted but troubled orphan to be her successor.

programme.title: My Daddy is in Heaven
programme.desc: Becky, Adam and their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragic accident during a 4th of July celebration kills their father. Struggling with grief, Becky decides she needs to leave the family farm and all its memories. She leaves Acie with her grandfather Ben and visits with her friend from school, June. With all the best intent, June offers Becky plenty of distraction from her family life. Fueled by her anger at G*d and loss of faith, Becky starts drinking and making other self-destructive choices. Then, after Becky is arrested, Ben threatens to keep Acie until Becky is back on track. A chance encounter in a bus station with a traveler gives Becky what she needs to restore her faith and reunite with her family.

programme.title: Sleepless In Seattle
programme.desc: On her way to her engagement, Annie Reed hears a young boy on the radio wishing that his father would find a new wife. Unable to forget the story of Sam and his son, something begins to happen to Annie, something she's not really aware of, something like...magic.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An unemployed actor with a reputation for being difficult disguises himself as a woman to get a role in a soap opera.

programme.title: Loverboy
programme.desc: When it comes to romance, Patrick Dempsey delivers in this madcap comedy. Working his way through college as a pizza delivery boy, Dempsey learns a few lessons in love from bored housewives who are looking for more than anchovies on their pizza.

programme.title: Roxanne
programme.desc: Inspired by Cyrano de Bergerac, the comic story of a man with the heart of a great lover, the soul of a poet, and the nose for trouble.

programme.title: A Coffin for the Sheriff
programme.desc: Spaghetti Western icon Anthony Steffen stars as Shenandoah, a mysterious man who joins a ruthless band of highwaymen after overcoming an almost impossible and death-defying initiation.

programme.title: The Black Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two black bounty hunters arrive in a small western town on the trail of an outlaw. Finding the town without a sheriff, they take charge, much to the displeasure of the mostly white townsfolk. As they chase women, demand money, and stir up trouble, they wait for the right moment to capture their prey, raising tensions along the way.

programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trail Blazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers to Kentucky, but must fight Shawnee Indians who have been convinced by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land.

programme.title: Two Brothers in Trinity
programme.desc: After inheriting a land plot in a dusty place called Trinity, the antagonistic half-brothers, Lester and Jesse, reunite to pursue different aspirations, only to find themselves neck-deep in trouble. Will they ever fulfil their dreams?

programme.title: Carve Her Name with Pride
programme.desc: During World War II, Violette Szabo volunteers to be parachuted into France as a secret agent to aid a Resistance group. Ultimately captured by the Germans, she refuses to betray her comrades and must suffer the consequences.

programme.title: Brighton Rock
programme.desc: The scene is Brighton, with holidaymakers awaiting the arrival of Kolley Kibber, who is working on a stunt for his newspaper.

programme.title: Hell is A City
programme.desc: Set in Manchester, heartland of England's industrial north, Don Starling escapes from jail becoming England's most wanted man.

programme.title: Nowhere To Go
programme.desc: In London, a Canadian serving prison time for grand theft escapes prison and attempts to retrieve his loot, kept in a bank safety deposit box, but his accomplice takes the security key while he only has the pass code.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labeled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: A signal from the other side of the universe is received by a hive-like society. Two scientists, Cane and Eva, are chosen to leave home and journey many light years to find and colonise the distant world that sent this transmission.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Reunited and it Feels So Deadly
programme.desc: Aurora must interrogate all the suspects after someone is murdered during her high school reunion. (2021)

programme.title: An Emma Fielding Mystery: Past Malice
programme.desc: After one of her former colleagues is murdered in a supposedly cursed castle, Emma discovers a long list of suspects. (2018)

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective: A Healthy Place To Die
programme.desc: When a culinary whiz is invited as a guest speaker at a luxury resort spa, he soon finds himself at the centre of another murder mystery. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2015)

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: When a banker is found dead in a Victorian mansion, Shannon Hughes finds herself within another murder case. Starring Jewel (2018)

programme.title: Murder 101: Locked Room Mystery
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private eye investigate a murder at a new age retreat

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back.

programme.title: Lake Placid Vs. Anaconda
programme.desc: When they're not chowing down on sorority girls, get ready for the heart-pounding head to head battle between the crocodiles and anacondas!

programme.title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
programme.desc: A ruthless mercenary, Hammett (David Hasselhoff) and his team are on the hunt for a pair of giant snakes that have escaped and are on a mega-sized feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.sub-title: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: When a corporate pharmaceutical sponsor is about to pull the plug on research, part-time adventurer Dr. Jack Byron re-awakens their interest with tales of the Borneo black orchid, said to produce a chemical that can keep a cell reproducing indefinitely. When the trip becomes increasingly dangerous, due to floods, capsized boats and gigantic, ill-tempered anacondas, Byron refuses to allow his crew to end the expedition, and resorts to foul play in order to keep them on the trail.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: The youngest son (Hardy) of an alcoholic former boxer (Nolte) returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament -- a path that puts the fighter on a collision corner with his older brother (Edgerton).

programme.title: Secret Window
programme.desc: A writer is stalked at his remote lakeside cabin by a psychotic stranger seeking revenge for perceived plagiarism.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny and Mickey Lubitch learn that their son, Tod, is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world.

programme.title: The Buddy Holly Story
programme.desc: Buddy Holly laid the foundations for a generation of popular music with his ground-breaking combination of country music and rhythm & blues.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate the murder of a rap group while pursuing their other full-time professions.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: They chose the worst man for the job. They expected him to fail, but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. Personal demons put Jack a New York City cop at rock bottom.

programme.title: Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV
programme.desc: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the sacred Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis (Sean Bean) commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive..
